evidence_boundary: local-only; operator-supervised; single repeatability run; fresh run ID; fresh output root; read-only against source evidence; writes only below the output root until reviewed-safe artifacts are imported into the execution packet; no readiness claim; no evidence promotion; no source-artifact mutation
